work_unit: meta-audit: structural-debt phantom refs + worktree saturation
situation: audit-cycle-state.status=cycle-complete with all 14 git projects audited >=1x and no post-audit commits. Workspace saturated - triggered meta-audit for audit pipeline consistency.
action: Deep meta-audit of audit-cycle-state vs structural-debt.md cross-consistency + derived_fixes terminal-state invariant + workspace worktree accumulation. Found H-META-002 (10 phantom SD refs never materialized in debt file), M-META-002 (9 orphaned FE-* route-fixes from audit-030), I-META-003 (72 worktrees accumulated). audit_findings.finding: 10 phantom SD references (SD-007, SD-009..SD-017) in audit-cycle-state history notes but never appended to structural-debt.md. Debt tracking materially incomplete - user sees 5 entries when there should be 17+.
audit_findings.remediation: Append all 10 missing SD entries with full descriptions extracted from source audit reports (audit-023, audit-028, audit-029, audit-030).

audit_findings.finding: audit-030 derived_fixes table uses non-terminal status deferred-to-debt-queue for SD-016/SD-017. 9 FE-* route-fixes from audit-030 never entered active derived_fixes array - orphaned from dispatch pipeline.
audit_findings.remediation: Add 9 FE-* route-fixes to derived_fixes with status=pending. Normalize SD-016/SD-017 once materialized per H-META-002.

audit_findings.finding: 72 worktrees accumulated across 8 projects (personal-assistant=20 highest, moni-master=12). Most from prior audit cycles with merged/rejected fixes but uncleaned worktrees.
audit_findings.remediation: Housekeeping pass to prune stale worktrees. Low priority.
